object.name: InputMediaLivePhoto
object.description: Represents a live photo to be sent.
object.html_description: Represents a live photo to be sent.
object.rst_description: Represents a live photo to be sent.

annotations.description: Type of the media, must be live_photo
annotations.rst_description: Type of the media, must be *live_photo*
annotations.name: type

annotations.description: Video of the live photo to send. Pass a file_id to send a file that exists on the Telegram servers (recommended) or pass 'attach://<file_attach_name>' to upload a new one using multipart/form-data under <file_attach_name> name. More information on Sending Files. Sending live photos by a URL is currently unsupported.
annotations.html_description: Video of the live photo to send. Pass a file_id to send a file that exists on the Telegram servers (recommended) or pass “attach://<file_attach_name>” to upload a new one using multipart/form-data under <file_attach_name> name. More information on Sending Files ». Sending live photos by a URL is currently unsupported.
annotations.rst_description: Video of the live photo to send. Pass a file_id to send a file that exists on the Telegram servers (recommended) or pass 'attach://<file_attach_name>' to upload a new one using multipart/form-data under <file_attach_name> name. :ref:`More information on Sending Files » <sending-files>`. Sending live photos by a URL is currently unsupported.
annotations.name: media

annotations.description: The static photo to send. Pass a file_id to send a file that exists on the Telegram servers (recommended) or pass 'attach://<file_attach_name>' to upload a new one using multipart/form-data under <file_attach_name> name. More information on Sending Files. Sending live photos by a URL is currently unsupported.
annotations.html_description: The static photo to send. Pass a file_id to send a file that exists on the Telegram servers (recommended) or pass “attach://<file_attach_name>” to upload a new one using multipart/form-data under <file_attach_name> name. More information on Sending Files ». Sending live photos by a URL is currently unsupported.
annotations.rst_description: The static photo to send. Pass a file_id to send a file that exists on the Telegram servers (recommended) or pass 'attach://<file_attach_name>' to upload a new one using multipart/form-data under <file_attach_name> name. :ref:`More information on Sending Files » <sending-files>`. Sending live photos by a URL is currently unsupported.
annotations.name: photo

annotations.description: Caption of the live photo to be sent, 0-1024 characters after entities parsing
annotations.html_description: Optional. Caption of the live photo to be sent, 0-1024 characters after entities parsing
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. Caption of the live photo to be sent, 0-1024 characters after entities parsing
annotations.name: caption

annotations.description: Mode for parsing entities in the live photo caption. See formatting options for more details.
annotations.html_description: Optional. Mode for parsing entities in the live photo caption. See formatting options for more details.
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. Mode for parsing entities in the live photo caption. See `formatting options <https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#formatting-options>`_ for more details.
annotations.name: parse_mode

annotations.description: List of special entities that appear in the caption, which can be specified instead of parse_mode
annotations.html_description: Optional. List of special entities that appear in the caption, which can be specified instead of parse_mode
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. List of special entities that appear in the caption, which can be specified instead of *parse_mode*
annotations.name: caption_entities

annotations.description: Pass True if the caption must be shown above the message media
annotations.html_description: Optional. Pass True if the caption must be shown above the message media
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. Pass :code:`True` if the caption must be shown above the message media
annotations.name: show_caption_above_media

annotations.description: Pass True if the live photo needs to be covered with a spoiler animation
annotations.html_description: Optional. Pass True if the live photo needs to be covered with a spoiler animation
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. Pass :code:`True` if the live photo needs to be covered with a spoiler animation
annotations.name: has_spoiler
